ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the brand's headquarters */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON string containing links to the brand's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the style belongs to */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "style_description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the style is designed (e.g., Men, Women) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the style (e.g., T-Shirts, Dresses) */,
  "size_system" TEXT /* Size system used (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit (e.g., Regular, Slim, Loose) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the style is designed for (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  "collection" TEXT /* Name of the collection the style belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_styles_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style the size belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement of the garment */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement of the garment */,
  "sleeve" REAL /* Sleeve measurement of the garment */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement of the garment */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement of the garment */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement of the garment */,
  "thigh" REAL /* Thigh measurement of the garment */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement of the garment */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL to the size chart image for the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "3d_model_url" TEXT /* URL to the 3D model of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the variant belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the variant represents */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the variant */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the variant */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the variant in stock */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for the variant */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the variant image */,
  "3d_model_url" TEXT /* URL to the 3D model of the variant */,
  "barcode" TEXT /* Barcode for the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product variant in stock */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the variant is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the variant in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the variant */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date and time the last reorder was placed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the warehouse */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* JSON string containing operational hours of the warehouse */,
  "total_capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the warehouse in cubic meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., product manager, inventory manager, customer service) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
